case_title: RJM ACQUISITIONS LLC VS. GERARDO CARREON SR et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-13-2008 CONTINUED TO SEP-12-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 . NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
